Keynotes · Panels · Lectures

Elevating the Conversation on Future Farming.

Bringing a unique fusion of academic rigour and entrepreneurial grit to stages worldwide. I help audiences look past the hype of AI to see the harvest of the future.

Check Availability for 2026
Signature Topics
01

The Silicon Soil: AI’s Role in Global Food Security

A high-level keynote for policy makers and investors on how AI is moving from laboratory experiments to essential global field infrastructure.

02

Invisible Barriers: The Female Founder’s Journey in AgTech

An empowering narrative on navigating the male-dominated intersection of Ag & Tech, and why diversity is a prerequisite for agricultural innovation.

03

Eyes of the Machine: Computer Vision in Post-Harvest Quality

A deep dive into automating quality control for agrifood produce. How non-destructive AI sensing ensures shelf-life, reduces waste, and standardizes global trade.

04

The First Leaf: AI & Computer Vision in Forestry Nurseries

Transforming silviculture through automated seedling QC. How AI monitors viability and stress in the nursery to ensure higher survival rates, better timber quality, and more resilient reforestation at scale.

05

Beyond the Hype: Practical AI for Modern Agronomy

A technical yet accessible session on plant phenotyping, variable rate fertilization, and the practical data ethics of the modern autonomous orchard.

UK & Global Engagements

Women in Innovation Community Forum Pre-selected member
WIPO Geneva Online Panelist
Virgin Startup Step-up Female Founder
Oxford Farming Conference Inspire Programme Fellow
Engagement Formats

Tailored for Your Audience

Every session is customized. I don’t just deliver data; I deliver a perspective that resonates with the specific challenges of your region or sector.

  • Keynote Addresses: Visionary and inspiring.
  • Technical Lectures: For universities and research institutes.
  • Panel Moderation: Driving deep, uncomfortable, and necessary discussions.
  • Workshops: Practical "How-to" sessions for agrifood teams.
"Dr. Kuzmenko’s ability to simplify complex policy into actionable steps is unparalleled."
Dr. Maryna Kuzmenko

Architecting the future of agrifood through AI, Policy, and Human-First Innovation.
